## [00:00 - 03:00]

This is a pubcast shot. I'm John Loomer. You know what? Man, I should bring back podcasts. Let's go All right, so you'd be forgiven if you forgot about this or Maybe you never even knew it was a thing because honestly, I think this was only a test within the US but Facebook launched Facebook podcasts in 2021 and honestly, I would have thought this was like 2017 or something But I went back and looked at all my old blog posts and yeah, I covered this back in 2021 so if you don't remember the way this worked Facebook pages had a podcast section and I did this with my own podcasts on my Facebook page So all you did was you connected the RSS feed of your own Podcast so you had to verify that you owned it to your Facebook page and then new episodes Automatically published to your page Honestly, that's a lot like what we see with YouTube podcasts and really probably anywhere else where your podcast to distributed to multiple locations and Facebook was one of them and then that podcast episode was not only published to this Section of your page, but to your followers feeds Right, so it appeared like a video in their feed like a Facebook video So is in app right so they didn't have to click on it and go anywhere They could play it like a video in app, which was awesome Unfortunately, it never caught on for whatever reason the test ended 10 months later in 2022 now looking back it was likely because of Metas focus. I can't recall whether they were focused on short form video at that point I think they were or they were about to be but it makes sense looking back that Short form video and everything they were throwing into that would take priority over Podcasts at that point, but the thing is man, this had so much potential especially obviously for podcasters, but especially for advertisers I'm reminded of this right now with my podcast bringing it back advertising podcast is So Challenging because you have to send people off of Facebook off of Instagram Which is you know a challenge in itself first of all But the problem is you're not optimizing for like a typical conversion you can that's a whole other separate topic That's what I'm trying to do right now, but that's not that easy Otherwise you're optimizing for link clicks landing page views whatever But even if you sent them to your website and you're optimizing for conversion like what I'm doing is I created a custom event
